label: About
heading: Signe Skovbye, founder
body: I'm a committed sexologist who has trained in the field for years. I work across several areas where my in-depth knowledge of sexology applies — in the context of people's physical, psychological, and social wellbeing.
I hold a professional bachelor's degree in psychomotor therapy (KP) combined with advanced training in clinical sexology (DACS).
I approach every project with a therapeutic mindset, working to understand and support people's sexual and general wellbeing.
I have a particular focus on LGBTQIA+ and other marginalised groups, who are offered special rates and adapted settings as needed.
